title: ExtraHitboxes
description: Add extra hitboxes from geckolib and blockbench
body:
# ExtraHitboxes

> ⚠️ FABRIC IS NOT IMPLEMENTED (hence, neoforge is kinda dirty)

API to introduce extra hitboxes for entities, as well as geckolib entities. Plugin for BlockBench included.

## Inspiration

Inspired by [MoreHitboxes](https://github.com/DarkPred/MoreHitboxes) made by [DarkPred](https://github.com/DarkPred).
